raw_records.title: Office of the Communications Authority - Mobile Roaming in Greater Bay Area
raw_records.text_sample: Office of the Communications Authority - Mobile Roaming in Greater Bay Area [Index] [Section Index] [Previous] In order to meet the growing demand for roaming services within the Greater Bay Area, operators offer a wide range of mobile roaming service plans at a lower charge as compared with standard roaming rates to consumers, such as: Greater Bay Area Plans (GBA plans) GBA plan offers a single service plan for shared use of a mobile data quota for usage within the Greater Bay Area and other cities in the Mainland. Roaming voice services are usually offered at a lower charge as compared with standard roaming rates. One-Card-Multiple-Numbers (1CMN) Plans 1CMN plan provides one local mobile number per location (e.g. Hong Kong/Mainland/Macao) for use by the same customer thus allowing easier and more affordable access to mobile data and voice connections in that location. Data Roaming Day
